title: Aspect Ratio
description: Displays content within a desired ratio.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install the required dependencies for the aspect ratio component.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

examples.title: Default
examples.description: A portrait card using a 4:5 ratio.

examples.title: Widescreen
examples.description: A classic 16:9 frame for videos, hero media, and landscape images.

examples.title: Square
examples.description: A 1:1 frame for avatars, thumbnails, and compact previews.

examples.title: Portrait
examples.description: A 3:4 frame for mobile previews, posters, and vertical images.

examples.title: Ultrawide
examples.description: A 21:9 frame for panoramic images and cinematic banners.

examples.title: Gallery
examples.description: A mixed layout showing multiple ratios together.
